title: EAI Classification Document v1
description: Producer-agnostic interchange schema for Enterprise AI Classification Framework documents. Both the eai-classificator research artefact and third-party tooling (e.g. partner 'kenza' conversational survey tooling) produce documents conforming to this schema. NOTE: jsonschema is not a declared project dependency; this file is documentation-grade. Validation is performed by the Python parser in src/presidio_ikigov_assess/classification.py, which is the authoritative source of truth.

schema.description: Schema version identifier. Must be exactly 'eai-classification/v1'.

producer.description: Optional free-form producer identification (name, version, tool). Not validated.

use_cases.description: List of classified AI use cases. Maximum 200 entries.

UseCase.description: A single AI use-case classification entry. Unknown fields are silently ignored (forward compatibility).

id.description: Use-case identifier. Same validation rules as IKI-Gov use-case names.

type.description: AI system type: T1=Decision, T2=Predictive, T3=Generative, T4=Conversational, T5=Visual, T6=Physical.

level.description: Autonomy level. L1-L5 are ordinal (increasing autonomy). L6 is the ecosystem/multi-system coordination regime (non-ordinal overlay). When ecosystem=true, the effective cell level is normalised to L6 regardless of the declared base level. level=L6 combined with ecosystem=false is a contradiction and is rejected.

oneOf.description: Use-case display name as a {lang: str} dict, e.g. {"de": "...", "en": "..."}.

ecosystem.description: Whether this use case operates in the L6 ecosystem/multi-system coordination regime. When true, effective cell level is normalised to L6. level=L6 + ecosystem=false is a contradiction.

confidence.description: Producer confidence score for the classification, in [0, 1].
